message.content: {"problems":[{"number":5,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"함수 $f(x) = (x + 2)(2x^2 - x - 2)$ 에 대하여 $f'(1)$의 값은?","choices":["6","7","8","9","10"]},{"number":6,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"$1$ 보다 큰 두 실수 $a, b$가 $\\log_a b = 3, \\log_3 a = 2$ 를 만족시킬 때, $\\log_g ab$의 값은?","choices":["3","7","12","5","2"]},{"number":7,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"두 곡선 $y = x^2 + 3$, $y = -5x^2 + 3$과 직선 $x = 2$로 둘러싸인 부분의 넓이는?","choices":["\\frac{18}{5}","\\frac{7}{2}","\\frac{17}{5}","\\frac{33}{10}","\\frac{16}{5}"]}]}
